entry.title: Hexo_NexT主题配置
entry.content: Hexo NexT主题定制化修改折腾几天，总算是有了自己的Blog，也算是一个新的开始。 NexT主题的装修也零零散散花了些时间，期间也参考了不少其他博主的配置，总算 是部署成自己比较钟意的样式了。为了便于之后的维护，对NexT主题配置文件的修改记录如下： 修改languages\zh-Hans.yml 12345修改overview: 站点概览 -> 关于作者in: 分类于 -> 分类添加commentcount: 评论数 修改layout_macro\post.swig 123456789101112在“评论数”的符号后添加中文描述<span class="post-meta-item-text">{{__('post.commentcount')}}&#58;</span>在文章末尾添加“The End”标记<div> {% if not is_index %} {% include 'passage-end-tag.swig' %} {% endif %}</div>修改文件结尾标签前的“#”为标签图标<a href="{{ url_for(tag.path) }}" rel="tag"><i class="fa fa-tag"></i> {{ tag.name }}</a> 修改layout_partials\footer.swig 12修改页面底部用户名前面的图标<i class="fa fa-address-card"></i> 修改layout_partials\head.swig 123456789添加如下段，配合DaoVoice的使能功能{% if theme.daovoice %} <script> (function(i,s,o,g,r,a,m){i["DaoVoiceObject"]=r;i[r]=i[r]||function(){(i[r].q=i[r].q||[]).push(arguments)},i[r].l=1*new Date();a=s.createElement(o),m=s.getElementsByTagName(o)[0];a.async=1;a.src=g;a.charset="utf-8";m.parentNode.insertBefore(a,m)})(window,document,"script",('https:' == document.location.protocol ? 'https:' : 'http:') + "//widget.daovoice.io/widget/0f81ff2f.js","daovoice") daovoice('init', { app_id: "{{theme.daovoice_app_id}}" }); daovoice('update'); </script>{% endif %} 修改layout_layout.swig 12添加如下段，使能首页右上角github链接<a href="https://github.com/jxbuaa" class="github-corner" aria-label="View source on GitHub"><svg width="80" height="80" viewBox="0 0 250 250" style="fill:#151513; color:#fff; position: absolute; top: 0; border: 0; right: 0;" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M0,0 L115,115 L130,115 L142,142 L250,250 L250,0 Z"></path><path d="M128.3,109.0 C113.8,99.7 119.0,89.6 119.0,89.6 C122.0,82.7 120.5,78.6 120.5,78.6 C119.2,72.0 123.4,76.3 123.4,76.3 C127.3,80.9 125.5,87.3 125.5,87.3 C122.9,97.6 130.6,101.9 134.4,103.2" fill="currentColor" style="transform-origin: 130px 106px;" class="octo-arm"></path><path d="M115.0,115.0 C114.9,115.1 118.7,116.5 119.8,115.4 L133.7,101.6 C136.9,99.2 139.9,98.4 142.2,98.6 C133.8,88.0 127.5,74.4 143.8,58.0 C148.5,53.4 154.0,51.2 159.7,51.0 C160.3,49.4 163.2,43.6 171.4,40.1 C171.4,40.1 176.1,42.5 178.8,56.2 C183.1,58.6 187.2,61.8 190.9,65.4 C194.5,69.0 197.7,73.2 200.1,77.6 C213.8,80.2 216.3,84.9 216.3,84.9 C212.7,93.1 206.9,96.0 205.4,96.6 C205.1,102.4 203.0,107.8 198.3,112.5 C181.9,128.9 168.3,122.5 157.7,114.1 C157.9,116.9 156.7,120.9 152.7,124.9 L141.0,136.5 C139.8,137.7 141.6,141.9 141.8,141.8 Z" fill="currentColor" class="octo-body"></path></svg></a><style>.github-corner:hover .octo-arm{animation:octocat-wave 560ms ease-in-out}@keyframes octocat-wave{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0)}20%,60%{transform:rotate(-25deg)}40%,80%{transform:rotate(10deg)}}@media (max-width:500px){.github-corner:hover .octo-arm{animation:none}.github-corner .octo-arm{animation:octocat-wave 560ms ease-in-out}}</style> 修改source\css_common\components\sidebar\sidebar-author.styl 123456添加如下段，势能圆形头像和动态旋转效果border-radius: 50%;transition: 1.5s all; .site-author-image:hover { transform: rotate(360deg);} 修改source\css_custom\custom.styl 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435// 修改网站头部颜色/* .headband { height: 3px; background: #bbb;} */.site-meta { padding: 20px 0; color: #fff; background: $winered;}.site-subtitle { // margin-top: 10px; // font-size: 13px; color: #ffffff;}// 鼠标移动至文章标题时的效果.posts-expand .post-title-link::before { content: ""; position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 1px; bottom: 0; left: 0; background-color: $winered; visibility: hidden; -webkit-transform: scaleX(0); -moz-transform: scaleX(0); -ms-transform: scaleX(0); -o-transform: scaleX(0); transform: scaleX(0); transition-duration: 0s; // transition-timing-function: ease-in-out; // transition-delay: 0s;} 修改source\css_variables\custom.styl 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647$winered = rgba(174,50,54,0.85)// Layout sizes// --------------------------------------------------$main-desktop = 80%// Background color for <body>$body-bg-color = gainsboro// Pagination// --------------------------------------------------$pagination-link-hover-border = $winered$pagination-active-bg = $winered// Buttons// --------------------------------------------------$btn-default-radius = 0$btn-default-bg = white$btn-default-color = $winered$btn-default-border-width = 1px$btn-default-border-color = $winered$btn-default-hover-bg = $winered$btn-default-hover-color = white$btn-default-hover-border-color = $winered// 文章内链接文本样式.post-body p a{ color: #0593d3; border-bottom: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #0593d3; &:hover { color: #fc6423; border-bottom: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #fc6423; }}// 主页文章上下左右间距.post {//margin-top: 5px;// margin-bottom: 3px; padding: 3px;} 修改_config.yml 1涉及改动内容较多，在此不再赘述 Hexo常用命令 清空工程，便于重新生成站点文件，改动涉及hexo框架内文件时使用hexo clean 生成站点文件hexo g 启动本地server，不更改port一般为http://localhost:4000hexo s 生成站点文件，并部署到githubhexo g -d 未完待续 …
